name: Rashad Evans
winProfile: 2 Elite+ wins, 4 Top-5+ wins, 8 ranked quality wins.
shortCase: An unbeaten rise, a UFC title, and elite wins over Forrest Griffin, Chuck Liddell, Rampage Jackson, and Phil Davis.
bestArgument: Evans built a 13-0-1 start, knocked out Liddell and Griffin, won the light heavyweight title, and produced a deep elite-win ledger.
counterArgument: He lost the title in his first defense, never regained it, and ended his UFC career on a long decline. One title win limits the championship case.
whyRankedHere: Evans built a 13-0-1 start, knocked out Liddell and Griffin, won the light heavyweight title, and produced a deep elite-win ledger.
whyNotHigher: He lost the title in his first defense, never regained it, and ended his UFC career on a long decline. One title win limits the championship case.
finalTakeaway: An unbeaten rise, a UFC title, and elite wins over Forrest Griffin, Chuck Liddell, Rampage Jackson, and Phil Davis.
